name: molgenis-emx2-staging-migrator

metadata.name: molgenis-emx2-staging-migrator
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v3 (LGPLv3)
metadata.summary: Python package for migrating Molgenis EMX2 staging areas to a catalogue.

documentation:
# Installation

```console
pip install molgenis-emx2-staging-migrator
```

## How to use

Within your Python project import the class StagingMigrator and use it as a context manager

```py
from molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator import StagingMigrator

token = '...'

with StagingMigrator('https://example.molgeniscloud.org', token=token) as migrator:

    # Retrieve sign-in information
    print(migrator.status)
    
    # Set the staging area and catalogue
    migrator.set_staging_area('StagingExample')
    migrator.set_catalogue('catalogue')
    
    # Execute the migration
    migrator.migrate()
    

```

## Development




## Build

```console
(venv) $ python -m build

(venv) $ pip install dist/molgenis-emx2-staging_migrator*.whl
```

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.__main__.main
documentation: Read the sign-in credentials and the staging areas to migrate from the .env file.

modules.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils
documentation: Utility functions for the StagingMigrator class.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.prepare_pkey
documentation: Prepares a primary key by adding a reference to a table if necessary.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.query_columns_string
documentation: Constructs a query string based on the level of indentation requested.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.find_cohort_references
documentation:
Finds the references in the target catalogue to the Cohorts table.
References may be direct or indirect, such as the 'Subcohort counts' table
that references the 'Subcohorts' table, which references the 'Cohorts' table directly.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.construct_delete_variables
documentation: Constructs a variables filter for querying the GraphQL table on the desired column values.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.has_statement_of_consent
documentation: Checks whether this table has a column that asks for a statement of consent.

functions.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.utils.process_statement
documentation: Processes any statement of consent by modifying the rows in the table for which no consent is given.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.SyncTables.TablesToSync
documentation: The dictionary values are set to None or in case of UMCG cohorts to GDPR.

modules.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.graphql_queries
documentation: Class with queries for querying the Molgenis server.

classes.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.__init__
documentation: Sets up the StagingMigrator by logging in to the client.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.set_staging_area
documentation: Sets the staging area and verifies its existence.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.set_catalogue
documentation: Sets the catalogue and verifies its existence.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.migrate
documentation: Performs the migration of the staging area to the catalogue.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._download_schema_zip
documentation: Download target schema as zip, save in case upload fails.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._delete_staging_from_catalogue
documentation:
Prepares the staging area by deleting data from tables
that are later synchronized from the staging area.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._query_delete_rows
documentation: Queries the rows to be deleted from a table.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._delete_table_entries
documentation: Deletes the rows marked by the primary keys from the table.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._cohorts_in_ref_array
documentation: Returns True if cohorts are referenced in a referenced array in any column in this table.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._verify_schemas
documentation: Ensures the staging area and catalogue are available.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._create_upload_zip
documentation: Combines the relevant tables of the staging area into a zipfile.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._upload_zip_stream
documentation:
Uploads the zip file containing the tables from the staging area
to the catalogue.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._upload_fallback_zip
documentation: Restores the catalogue to the state before deletion by uploading the downloaded target zip.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._get_table_pkey_values
documentation: Fetches the primary key values associated with the staging area's table.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.last_change
documentation:
Retrieves the datetime of the latest change made on the staging area.
Returns None if the changelog is disabled or empty.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator._cleanup
documentation: Deletes the downloaded files after successful migration.

methods.name: molgenis_emx2_staging_migrator.migrator.StagingMigrator.__construct_pkey_query
documentation: Constructs a GraphQL query for finding the primary key values in a table.

The StagingMigrator class is used to migrate updated data in a staging area to a catalogue.
The class subclasses the Molgenis EMX2 Pyclient to access the API on the server
